pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py explicit checks
task.json description and verifier.py explicit checks
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh both search using '-iname "LobbyTrack*.mdb" -o -iname "Sample*.mdb"'
export_result.sh explicit string grep checks and verifier.py scoring

privileged_info_summary: The task requires manually entering the synthetic target company 'Aramark' located in 'Philadelphia' into the Jolly Lobby Track reference list. Evaluation scripts explicitly check for the strings 'Aramark' and 'Philadelphia' within any database file matching 'LobbyTrack*.mdb' or 'Sample*.mdb' in the Wine C: drive to confirm successful data entry.
